CheckTitle: ECS instances should use SSH key pairs for authentication
Description: Ensure that ECS instances use SSH key pairs instead of password-based authentication for secure access.
Risk: ECS instances without SSH key pairs may rely on password-based authentication, which is more susceptible to brute-force attacks and unauthorized access.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console
2. Navigate to Elastic Cloud Server
3. Select the instance
4. Click More > Manage Key Pair
5. Bind an existing key pair or create a new one
6. Disable password-based login

Recommendation.Text: Bind SSH key pairs to all ECS instances and disable password-based authentication.
